conventions.field_ledger: toy prime-field rows use q_gen=q_line; no q_chal soundness division is claimed
conventions.witness_set: Pade-Hankel closed-ball shape T, followed by exact maximal S_z reconstruction

gpu_run.integer_arithmetic: int32 modular Pade-Hankel dot products; no cuBLAS

non_claims: GF(9) and extension-field rows are out of scope for this prime-field verifier.
The listed rows are finite enumerations, not an asymptotic theorem.
object: sigma_C(r)=max sparse-pair count of finite MCA-bad slopes
theorem_or_problem_id: towards-prize prob:mutual; thm:sparsify sparse mutual layer
